deals.name: Golden Boot Jackpot
deals.mechanic: Biggest recharge of the day wins a multiplier bonus
deals.line: Score the biggest. Win the boot.

deals.name: Hat Trick Bonus
deals.mechanic: 3 recharges during match hours = stacked bonus

deals.name: Penalty Kick Free Spin
deals.mechanic: Share code REF-GOLDENBOOT-284, friend joins = both get free spin bonus
deals.line: Pass it. They score. You both win.

deals.name: Halftime Reload
deals.mechanic: Mystery midnight drop for active players

acts.title: THE OPENING — Kickoff Whistle
acts.story: Lady E, in her black-and-gold referee dress, steps onto a stadium-lit casino floor and blows the gold whistle: the Road to the Final starts here. Golden Boot Jackpot announced for the whole day.

posts.beat: Lady E blows the whistle, gold confetti bursts, soccer ball morphs into a casino chip
Hero shot: Lady E on the center circle of a turf-floored casino, chip on the penalty spot
Golden boot filled with gold coins under a spotlight — Golden Boot Jackpot teaser

acts.title: THE WELCOME — New Signings
acts.story: Transfer-window framing: new players are 'new signings.' Lady E welcomes them personally. Lucky Lou arrives in his green-and-gold jersey, juggling a soccer ball badly but grinning. Bonus Wheel reminder.

posts.beat: Lady E extends a gloved hand across a gold-trimmed welcome table — 'You belong here'
Lucky Lou mid-juggle, ball bouncing off his fishing hat, clover in hand
Giant gold prize wheel styled like a stadium clock — 'resets at midnight' urgency

acts.title: THE GOLDEN RUSH — Hat Trick Hours
acts.story: The Golden Dealer flips three cards onto green turf felt: Hat Trick Bonus is live 3-6PM. Referral push framed as a perfect assist — Penalty Kick Free Spin with code REF-GOLDENBOOT-284.

posts.beat: Three gold cards fanned on turf felt by the Golden Dealer — Hat Trick Bonus reveal
Story double-post of 07 (same image, story crop) with countdown urgency
Penalty spot with a single spinning chip, goal net dripping gold coins — assist your friend
The Golden Dealer silently deals three cards; each flip ignites a gold flare; one sentence only

acts.title: JACKPOT PARADE — Trophy Lift
acts.story: The Summer Crew celebrates like a locker-room trophy lift — community wins night. Daily Bonus reminder before the day resets. Lucky Lou hits the crossbar — SO close — and laughs it off.

posts.beat: Summer Crew hoisting a gold trophy-cup of chips, confetti, stadium floodlights
Gold gift chest on the penalty spot, clock ticking — claim before the day resets
Lucky Lou hands-on-head as his chip rattles the crossbar of a gold goal frame — almost!

acts.title: GOLDEN HOUR — Extra Time
acts.story: Stadium lights dim to gold. Halftime Reload mystery drop opens. In extra time, Lucky Lou finally scores — his chip rolls in off the post and the floor erupts. Tomorrow tease: third-place match Saturday, final Sunday — the party is just starting.

posts.beat: Half-open vault glowing gold in a darkened stadium tunnel — mystery drop
Slow-mo: Lou's chip hits the post, teeters, drops in. Eruption. Lou lifts his clover like a trophy. Tomorrow tease text-free end card

character_arcs.lady_e: Referee-in-command: opens the day with the whistle, welcomes new signings, presides over Golden Hour.
character_arcs.lucky_lou: Almost-wins all day (juggling fail, crossbar rattle) then scores in extra time at Golden Hour — always ends the day winning.
character_arcs.golden_dealer: Appears once, Act 3, deals the Hat Trick. Says exactly one sentence: 'Three times. Three wins.'

song_of_the_day.title: Golden Kick
song_of_the_day.instruments: Log drums, 808 sub, brass stabs, stadium crowd swells, shekere percussion, airhorn accents, gold-bell melody line

lyrics.intro: (whistle blows) Oh-oh-oh... you hear the drums? / The road ends Sunday but the gold's already come
lyrics.verse_1: Floodlights on, turf like emerald money / Crown on my head, yeah the future's looking sunny / Ninety minutes? No, we play all day / Chips on the spot, watch me put 'em in play
lyrics.pre_chorus: One touch, two touch, feel the stadium sway / Every heart in here beating one way
lyrics.chorus: Golden kick, golden kick — let it fly, let it hit / Top corner of the night, every spin is a hit / Golden kick, golden kick — hands up if you're with it / We don't chase, we celebrate — that's how legends did it
lyrics.verse_2: Lou on the wing with the clover in his grip / Post, then in — that's a champion trip / Dealer flips three, now the rush goes loud / E on the whistle with the gold-lit crowd
lyrics.bridge: (crowd swell) When the lights go low and the vault swings wide / Extra time is where the magic hides / Oh-oh-oh... hold the line / The second half always surprises — every time
lyrics.final_chorus: Golden kick, golden kick — let it fly, let it hit / Top corner of the night, every spin is a hit / Golden kick, golden kick — crown up if you're with it / Road to the final, and you're already in it
lyrics.outro: (whistle, long) Oh-oh-oh... see you at Golden Hour / Lady E Luck — where every kick turns gold

required_promos_map.todays_special: posts 07 + 08 (Feed 2:30PM + Story 3:30PM double-post) — Hat Trick Bonus
